name: ardur-pipeline
description: End-to-end orchestrator that runs the four Ardur content engines on the 6-hour cycle: aggregate -> rank -> top10 -> synthesize -> publish the artifacts ardur.ai consumes.

name: ardur-contracts
description: Shared wire contract for the Ardur AI content pipeline (@ardurai/contracts)

name: ardur-article-synthesizer
description: AI synthesis of one original, copyright-safe article per Top-10 topic from clustered sources

name: ardur-top10-engine
description: Top-10 selection and 6-hour refresh orchestration for the Ardur AI content pipeline

name: ardur-ranking-engine
description: Multi-signal scoring (interaction, credibility, recency, source diversity) with full audit trail for the Ardur AI content pipeline

name: ardur-news-aggregator
description: Global multi-source news ingestion, dedup, clustering, and interaction-metric capture for the Ardur AI content pipeline
